title: Build a point-in-time training join
description: Steps to assemble a leakage-free training set with an as-of join keyed on entity and event time.
body: Use when constructing a training set from time-varying features. Do not join on entity alone and grab the latest feature value — that pulls future data into past rows. Actions: order events by time, perform an as-of join taking the latest feature strictly before each label timestamp, and verify no joined feature postdates its label. Validation signals include a join audit confirming feature time precedes label time for every row and a temporal-holdout metric that holds. Risk boundary: a sloppy join injects temporal leakage that inflates offline metrics; if any row fails the timing check, deny the dataset and rebuild the join before training.
